full_text:
Ding Guan 丁管
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Guan (丁管). Opposed Dong Zhuo’s change of Emperors and was killed for defiance. Ding Guan is a fictional character. Ding Guan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Ding Guan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
